executives.name: Fiona Robertson
executives.background: Ms Robertson has over 40 years’ experience in corporate finance, investment banking, and the resource sector. She has held senior roles at Chase Manhattan Bank and Delta Gold.

executives.name: Nicholas Cernotta
executives.background: Nicholas Cernotta is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the resources industry. He has held senior executive roles at Fortescue Metals Group and Macmahon Holdings.

executives.name: Nick Cernotta
executives.background: Mr Cernotta is a mining engineer with over 35 years’ experience in the mining industry. He has held senior executive roles at Fortescue Metals Group, Macmahon Holdings, and Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Tamara Brown
executives.background: Ms. Brown is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience in finance and business development.
